'''Neor-Yatten''' was the vehicle manufacturing company that produced [[para-wing glider]]s. Two of their products were the [[ShadoWing-4]] and [[ShadoWing-6]].<ref name="GG2" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1989-04-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]'' {{1stm}}
